name: Partially my fault in work accident - does that bar comp in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault in work accident - does that bar comp in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, workers' comp is no-fault; covers negligence by employee.[9] Fault irrelevant for benefits. Key factors: (1) Strict liability for covered injuries; (2) Contributory negligence no defense; (3) Third-party comparative fault applies; (4) Intentional acts may bar. Report and file regardless. Personal injury for others adjusts by fault.[9]
